---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for this reference solution
title: '[ENHANCEMENT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. E.g. "I'm frustrated when the UI doesn't have an option for X..." or "We need Y to demonstrate microservices architecture best practice..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or mockups about the feature request here.
